query: What aberration corrections does SPICE support?
answer: SPICE supports these aberration corrections: `'CN'`, `'CN+S'`, `'LT'`, `'LT+S'`, `'NONE'`, `'RL'`, `'RL+S'`, `'S'`, `'XCN'`, `'XCN+S'`, `'XLT'`, `'XLT+S'`, `'XRL'`, `'XRL+S'`, and `'XS'` [file:../data/spice/src/spicelib/zzprscor.f:69-91]. The letter `'R'` indicates relativistic corrections, and stellar aberration-only corrections are indicated by `'S'` and `'XS'` [file:../data/spice/src/spicelib/zzprscor.f:93-101]. Case and embedded blanks are not significant in the aberration correction string [file:../data/spice/src/spicelib/zzprscor.f:103-104].
